description: Test of whether LLMs are more similar to each other than political parties are, measuring inter-model vs. inter-party pairwise agreement on referenda.
models_excluded: Gemini 3.1 Pro (98% refusal rate in German)
methodology: Mean pairwise binary agreement across all model pairs vs. all party pairs. Mann-Whitney U test and permutation test (10,000 iterations).

results.interpretation: Models more similar to each other than parties are to each other
